subcodes.title: Words spoken en route in train in Chicago, 1912-10-31
subcodes.first_line: It is now more than two years that I have been far from the Holy Shrine of Baha'u'llah. Now I must return. If God wills it, I shall make another journey in another direction
subcodes.first_line_orig: متجاوز از دو سال است که از جوار روضهٴ مبارکه دورم حال باید مراجعت کنم اگر باز مقدر شود
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
